untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit Implied Volatility (IV) and Historical Volatility (HV) indicators with precise IV-to-HV spread measurement and multi-day persistence tracking. Available indicators (india_vix, hvol_20) are proxies but do not capture: (1) true IV-HV spread threshold calibration, (2) consecutive day persistence logic (requires state tracking across bars), (3) IV percentile calculation against 1-year range. Original source text is corrupted/unreadable, preventing validation against Natenberg's original methodology.
translation_notes: Mapped india_vix as IV proxy and hvol_20 as HV proxy. Entry requires IV > HV with absolute IV above typical floor. Exit on spread compression. However, this is a degraded translation—the signal's core logic (persistent multi-day IV-HV spread, percentile ranking) cannot be fully expressed in the allowed indicator set without custom volatility indicators and state persistence.
